series_metadata.series_title: (DSH) Division of Safety & Hygiene Student Training Records
series_metadata.series_description: This schedule refers to pertinent hard-copy and electronically stored (LMS) Learning Management System documentation of employees of Ohio employers and BWC employees'' participation in and completion of safety and health training., seminars, workshops, etc., sponsored by DSH. Relevant data includes student and employer contact/affiliation information, course description, conformation of completion, etc., which is utilized and tracked by DSH for continuing education units, statistical research and analysis, and agency historical data. LMS contains information that serves to document a student''s official transcript of completed safety and health professional training.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: registration is electronically entered into BWC (LMS) Learning Management System ; Electronic
